Return.Description: true if the user is allowed to use the Tweet UI

Functions.Name: ShowTweetUI
Functions.Description:
Kicks off a tweet, using the platform to show the UI. If this returns false, or you are on a platform that doesn't support the UI,
	  you can use the TwitterRequest method to perform a manual tweet using the Twitter API

Params.Name: URL
Params.Description: [optional] URL to attach to the tweet

Params.Name: Picture
Params.Description: [optional] Name of a picture (stored locally, platform subclass will do the searching for it) to add to the tweet

Return.Description: true if a UI was displayed for the user to interact with, and a TID_TweetUIComplete will be sent

Functions.Name: AuthorizeAccounts
Functions.Description:
Starts the process of authorizing the local user(s). When TID_AuthorizeComplete is called, then GetNumAccounts() 
	  will return a valid number of accounts

Return.Description: true if the authorization process started, and TID_AuthorizeComplete delegates will be called
The number of accounts that were authorized
the display name of the given Twitter account

Functions.Name: TwitterRequest
Functions.Description: Kicks off a generic twitter request

Params.Name: URL
Params.Description: The URL for the twitter request

Params.Name: AccountIndex
Params.Description: A user index if an account is needed, or -1 if an account isn't needed for the request

Return.Description: true the request was sent off, and a TID_RequestComplete
